visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Business]
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of Euro 15.9 all service charge are non refundable and inclusive of applicable tax
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
visa_types.processing_time:
Your visa application is going to be resulted approximately 15 calendar days following the date Embassy begins evaluating them. However, in some cases, this process may be extended up

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Lithuania for conference meetings.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Lithuania for conference meetings.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Business]
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of Euro 15.9 all service charge are non refundable and inclusive of applicable tax
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.

## Documents Required

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 3-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against white background
- Distance of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/11SRs7ItC1Yvjk3hlOKcGN/d0f6b45f7b90339e4054d821c7c176e3/photo-specification.pdf) for more information

## Processing Time
Your visa application is going to be resulted approximately 15 calendar days following the date Embassy begins evaluating them. However, in some cases, this process may be extended up
                                                                        to 30 days or 60 days.

## Download Forms
Download Application Form (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm)

- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost
visa_types.processing_time:
Your visa application is going to be resulted approximately 15 calendar days following the date Embassy begins evaluating them. However, in some cases, this process may be extended up
                                                                        to 30 days or 60 days.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Lithuania for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from an Lithuania referent.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Lithuania for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from an Lithuania referent.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Tourist / Tourism]
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of Euro 15.9 all service charge are non refundable and inclusive of applicable tax
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost

## Documents Required

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 3-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against white background
- Distance of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/11SRs7ItC1Yvjk3hlOKcGN/d0f6b45f7b90339e4054d821c7c176e3/photo-specification.pdf) for more information

## Processing Time
Your visa application is going to be resulted approximately 15 calendar days following the date Embassy begins evaluating them. However, in some cases, this process may be extended up
                                                                        to 30 days or 60 days.

## Download Forms
Download Application Form (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm)
